title: Bring back Removed Recipes
description: Adds old recipes back to Minecraft, such as the bundle made from rabbit hide, the lead from a slimeball, and so on. (And doesn't replace them)
body:
## Bring Back Removed Recipes
### What this datapack does:

It adds new and old crafting recipes to Minecraft. The crafting recipes are shown in the **gallery**.

**NOTE**: These recipes do **NOT** replace the existing recipes in the game!!!

**Main changes:**
- `Horse armor` can be crafted (`Leather`, `Copper`, `Iron`, `Gold`, `Diamond`, `Netherite`).
- Netherite upgrade at the crafting table (with enchantment transfer!).
- 9 `strings` from 1 `cobweb`.
- `Barrel` made from `sticks` instead of `planks`.
- `Leather armor` made from `wool`.
- `Boat` recipe includes a `shovel`.
- `Brown dye` (`red` + `yellow` + `black`, or `orange` + `black`).
- `Bamboo planks` from 4 `bamboo`.
- `Arrow` uses an `iron ingot` instead of `flint`.
- `Lodestone` uses a `netherite ingot`.
- `Lead` made from a `slimeball`.
- `Bundle` made from `rabbit hide`.
- `Brush` ("string pickaxe").
- `Enchanted Golden Apple` (crafting recipe).
- `Copper doors` and `copper trapdoors` from `copper blocks` (amount per craft changed!)
